---
title: "Conteneurs & MicroVMs"
date: today
date-format: "YYYY-MM-DD"
---

# Conteneurs & MicroVMs

## Docker — Le standard

| Caractéristique | Valeur |
|-----------------|--------|
| Isolation | Namespace + cgroups |
| Latence démarrage | ~1-5s |
| Persistance | Volumes, images |
| Network | Bridge, custom networks |
| Écosystème | Immense (Docker Hub) |

```python
# Exemple: OpenHands sandbox (Docker)
import docker

client = docker.from_env()
container = client.containers.run(
    "openhands/sandbox:latest",
    command="python script.py",
    volumes={"./workspace": {"bind": "/workspace", "mode": "rw"}},
    network_mode="none",  # Pas d'internet
    mem_limit="2g",
    cpu_period=100000,
    cpu_quota=50000,  # 50% CPU
    remove=True  # Éphémère
)
```

## Podman — Daemonless, rootless

| Caractéristique | Valeur |
|-----------------|--------|
| Isolation | Namespace + cgroups (rootless) |
| Latence démarrage | ~1-5s |
| Docker compatible | ✅ (drop-in replacement) |
| Rootless | ✅ (par défaut) |
| Pods | ✅ (Kubernetes-like) |

::: callout-tip
## Podman pour la sécurité
Podman tourne rootless par défaut, réduisant la surface d'attaque. Idéal pour les sandboxes d'agents IA qui exécutent du code non fiable.
:::

## Firecracker — MicroVM

| Caractéristique | Valeur |
|-----------------|--------|
| Isolation | KVM-based MicroVM |
| Latence démarrage | ~125ms |
| Overhead | Minimal (~5MB RAM) |
| Sécurité | Isolation VM-level |
| Utilisé par | AWS Lambda, Fargate, Fly.io |

**Features** : Démarrage ultra-rapide, isolation forte (KVM), rate-limiting intégré, pas de device passthrough.

```python
# Exemple conceptuel Firecracker
# Nécessite l'API Firecracker
import subprocess

# Démarrer une microVM
subprocess.run([
    "firecracker",
    "--api-sock", "/tmp/firecracker.sock",
    "--config-file", "vm_config.json"
])
```

## Kata Containers — Container + VM

| Caractéristique | Valeur |
|-----------------|--------|
| Isolation | VM légère par container |
| Latence démarrage | ~1-2s |
| Docker compatible | ✅ (via containerd) |
| Kubernetes | ✅ (CRI-O, containerd) |

## gVisor — Kernel sandbox

| Caractéristique | Valeur |
|-----------------|--------|
| Isolation | User-space kernel (ptrace/KVM) |
| Latence démarrage | ~2-5s |
| Docker compatible | ✅ (`--runtime=runsc`) |
| Overhead | ~10-20% perf |

## Comparatif

| Solution | Isolation | Latence | Overhead | Sécurité | Complexité |
|----------|-----------|---------|----------|----------|------------|
| Docker | Container | 1-5s | Faible | Moyenne | Faible |
| Podman | Container (rootless) | 1-5s | Faible | Bonne | Faible |
| Firecracker | MicroVM | 125ms | Minimal | Excellente | Moyenne |
| Kata | VM + container | 1-2s | Modéré | Excellente | Moyenne |
| gVisor | User-space kernel | 2-5s | Modéré | Bonne | Faible |

::: callout-note
## Choix par cas d'usage
- **Dev local** → Docker ou Podman (simplicité)
- **Production multi-tenant** → Firecracker (isolation + vitesse)
- **Kubernetes enterprise** → Kata (compatibilité + sécurité)
- **Code non fiable** → gVisor ou Firecracker (isolation maximale)
:::

## Outils découverts automatiquement

<!-- TOOLS_SANDBOX_START -->
### [omnigent](https://github.com/omnigent-ai/omnigent)
Omnigent is an open-source AI agent framework and meta-harness: orchestrate Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Pi, and custom agents — swap harnesses without rewriting, enforce policies and sandboxing, an...

⭐ 7.5k | `Python` | Licence: Apache-2.0 | MAJ: 2026-07-19
**Tags** : `agent-framework`, `agent-governance`, `agent-orchestration`, `agents`, `ai`, `ai-agent`, `ai-agents`, `claude-code`

### [Wllama](https://github.com/ngxson/wllama)
WebAssembly binding for llama.cpp - Enabling in-browser LLM inference

⭐ 1.1k | `TypeScript` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-19
**Tags** : `llama`, `llamacpp`, `llm`, `wasm`, `webassembly`

### [Greywall](https://github.com/GreyhavenHQ/greywall)
Deny-by-default command sandbox for AI coding agents with filesystem isolation, network control via transparent proxy, built-in profiles for agents like Claude Code or OpenCode, and learning mode f...

⭐ 270 | `Go` | Licence: Apache-2.0 | MAJ: 2026-07-19
**Tags** : `agents`, `ai-security`, `claude-code`, `developer-tools`, `greyproxy`, `landlock`, `linux`, `llm`

### [Containarium](https://github.com/FootprintAI/Containarium)
Open-source agent runtime — SSH-native isolation, eBPF egress policy, Kubernetes + LXC backends, GPU passthrough, MCP-native CLI

⭐ 261 | `Go` | Licence: Apache-2.0 | MAJ: 2026-07-19
**Tags** : `agent-native`, `agent-runtime`, `agent-sandbox`, `agentic-ai`, `ai-agents`, `claude`, `code-sandbox`, `cursor`

### [sandboxes](https://github.com/nalgeon/sandboxes)
Sandboxes for running code and tools

⭐ 128 | `Shell` | Licence: Apache-2.0 | MAJ: 2026-07-17
**Tags** : `codapi`, `code-sandbox`, `sandbox`

### [sample-autonomous-cloud-coding-agents](https://github.com/aws-samples/sample-autonomous-cloud-coding-agents)
Autonomous background coding agents on AWS. Turn tasks into pull requests via isolated runtimes, with built-in orchestration, observability, and governance.

⭐ 112 | `TypeScript` | Licence: MIT-0 | MAJ: 2026-07-17
**Tags** : `agent-sandbox`, `agentcore`, `autonomous-agents`, `aws`, `background-agents`, `code-sandbox`, `coding-agents`, `dark-factory`

### [ajitpratap0/GoSQLX](https://github.com/ajitpratap0/GoSQLX)
!ajitpratap0/GoSQLX MCP server 🏎️ ☁️ 🏠 - 7 SQL tools (validate, format, parse, lint, security scan, metadata extraction, full analysis) over Streamable HTTP. Public remote server at mcp.gosqlx.dev ...

⭐ 105 | `Go` | Licence: Apache-2.0 | MAJ: 2026-07-09
**Tags** : `ast`, `cli`, `dialect`, `go`, `golang`, `lsp`, `mysql`, `parser`

### [ipybox](https://github.com/gradion-ai/ipybox)
Unified execution environment for Python code, shell commands, and programmatic MCP tool calls.

⭐ 73 | `Python` | Licence: Apache-2.0 | MAJ: 2026-07-06
**Tags** : `claude-code-plugin`, `code-execution`, `code-interpreter`, `code-mode`, `code-sandbox`, `ipython`, `mcp`, `mcp-client`

### [hileamlakB/PRIMS](https://github.com/hileamlakB/PRIMS)
🐍 🏠 – A Python Runtime Interpreter MCP Server that executes user-submitted code in an isolated environment.

⭐ 29 | `Python` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-05
**Tags** : `agents`, `docker`, `fastmcp`, `llm`, `mcp`, `mcp-server`, `open-source`, `python`

### [AryanBV/pdf-toolkit-mcp](https://github.com/AryanBV/pdf-toolkit-mcp)
!AryanBV/pdf-toolkit-mcp MCP server 📇 🏠 🍎 🪟 🐧 - Create PDFs from Markdown with tables and formatting, fill forms, merge, split, encrypt, add QR codes. 16 tools, zero-config, TypeScript-native.

⭐ 9 | `TypeScript` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-19
**Tags** : `ai-tools`, `claude`, `mcp`, `mcp-server`, `model-context-protocol`, `pdf`, `pdf-generation`, `pdf-lib`

### [Sowiedu/Edict](https://github.com/Sowiedu/Edict)
!Sowiedu/Edict MCP server 📇 🏠 – Agent-first programming language: agents produce JSON AST, the compiler validates, type-checks, effect-checks, verifies contracts via Z3/SMT, and compiles to WASM. 1...

⭐ 7 | `JavaScript` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-05
**Tags** : `ai`, `ai-agents`, `compiler`, `effect-system`, `formal-verification`, `json-ast`, `llm`, `mcp`

### [davidlandais/ovh-api-mcp](https://github.com/davidlandais/ovh-api-mcp)
!ovh-api-mcp MCP server 🦀 ☁️ - Code Mode MCP server for the entire OVH API. Two tools (search + execute) give LLMs access to all OVH endpoints via sandboxed JavaScript, using ~1,000 tokens instead ...

⭐ 1 | `Rust` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-05
**Tags** : `ai`, `ai-tools`, `automation`, `claude`, `cloud-api`, `cursor`, `devops`, `dns`

<!-- TOOLS_SANDBOX_END -->
